title: Replace logo with cropped speaker logo and fix slogan positioning

requirements.text: Replace the current logo in the Header component with the user's uploaded speaker logo image (file_000000008744720abc6dc9f1fb80f8e2-7.png) as a static asset in frontend/public/assets/generated
acceptanceCriteria: The speaker logo with gradient text and speaker icon is displayed in the header
The logo image is served as a static asset from frontend/public/assets/generated
The logo replaces any existing logo or placeholder in the Header component

requirements.text: Position the slogan text below the header separator line (not overlapping it) while maintaining close proximity to the logo above

quotes: There is the header line, to seperate the header from the rest of the page. The slogan was positioned exactly over it

acceptanceCriteria: The slogan appears completely below the header separator line with no overlap
Visual spacing between the logo and slogan remains minimal
The header separator line is clearly visible and unobstructed

constraints: Do not modify the structure of immutable paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
Keep the backend actor architecture unchanged (single-actor model in backend/main.mo)
nonGoals: Changing the header separator line styling or thickness
Adjusting the overall header layout beyond logo and slogan positioning

required: Crop the speaker logo to remove excess white background space around the graphic, keeping the SPEAKR gradient text and speaker icon tightly framed (speaker-logo.dim_800x200.png)
